project.name: spring-ai-fin langchain4j alternate RAG profile (optional)
project.description: Optional alternate RAG profile for consumers standardized on langchain4j (https://github.com/langchain4j/langchain4j; 11k+ stars; Apache-2.0; most active Java agent framework as of 2026-05). Provides a langchain4j-backed RAG facade alongside the Spring AI default. Consumers activate this by adding it to their classpath. Note: langchain4j is NOT a competitor. spring-ai-alibaba (com.alibaba.cloud.ai) IS a competitor and must NEVER be imported per oss-bill-of-materials.md sec-8.
